domain: Inca Moray terraces (Peru, 15th century; circular agricultural research station; 12 concentric levels descending 150m; 12-15°C top-bottom microclimate gradient; 250+ crop varieties tested across elevations; per-level distinct microclimate basin)
specific_mechanism: MORAY-12-LEVEL-BASIN: 12-level micro-basin temperature/LR-schedule with per-level OOD validation cascade. (1) Partition training schedule into 12 'elevation levels' each with distinct temperature τ_level (high at top, low at bottom) + LR_level (gradient steepness analog). (2) Per-level micro-basin perturbation validation: at each level, evaluate model on subset of OOD perturbation samples (synthetic distribution shifts). (3) Crop variety test: at each level, model evaluated on 250+ task variants spanning long-tail. (4) Stairstep schedule: descend to next level when current basin-pass; ascend if basin-fail. (5) Robust model = one passing all 12 levels' micro-basin OOD tests. (6) Differs from R460 LEVADE-LIPSCHITZ (continuous Lipschitz) + R485 JABAL-DRUZE-CHOKEPOINT (angular-cone) by explicit 12-level discrete temperature/LR + per-level OOD cascade.
llm_application: MORAY-12-LEVEL-BASIN 12-level temperature/LR schedule + per-level OOD perturbation validation + stairstep descent/ascent gating + 250-variant long-tail test. Differs from R404 SAN-NUM. R420 SIKH-LANGAR. R434 ZOU-HUN-BASIN. R450 LAAGER-BASIN. R460 LEVADE-LIPSCHITZ. R471 CAPOEIRA-GINGA. R485 JABAL-DRUZE-CHOKEPOINT. Differs from Curriculum LLM Pretraining 2601.21698 (closest — curriculum schedule, but no 12-level discrete temperature + no per-level OOD). Self-Evolving Curriculum 2505.14970 (Boltzmann τ + exploration-exploitation, no 12-level). Curriculum Temperature KD AAAI (τ scheduling, single dimension). Differs by 12-LEVEL DISCRETE ELEVATION TEMPERATURE/LR + PER-LEVEL OOD CASCADE + STAIRSTEP DESCENT/ASCENT GATING.
novelty_claim: Curriculum LLM + Self-Evolving Curriculum + Curriculum Temperature KD cover schedule + temperature paradigm. MORAY-12-LEVEL-BASIN adds (a) 12-level discrete elevation schedule + (b) per-level OOD validation cascade + (c) stairstep descent/ascent. Recombination — borderline lookup.
content_words: stairstep descent on basin-pass ascend on basin-fail

llm_side: stairstep descent on basin-pass ascend on basin-fail
